name: Chesapeake Restaurant Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
I personally like to add 1 teaspoon of Old Bay seasoning to this recipe and cut back a little on the salt.
Trying to preserve whole pieces of crabmeat, combine first 8 ingredients in a medium bowl. Using about 1/3 - 1/2 cup for each cake, shape mixture into 6 cakes. Gently coat cakes with breadcrumbs; place cakes on a plate and refrigerate for 2 hours.
Melt butter in an 10-inch skillet. Brown crab cakes in butter until golden on both sides and heated through. Cakes will keep in the refrigerator for 3-4 days and in the freezer for 2 months. To reheat, wrap in foil and warm in a preheated 325 degree oven for 10 minutes or refry in a skillet with a little butter.
